arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta offers worrying injury updates on three Arsenal stars ahead of Liverpool clash
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has warned that Bukayo Saka, Martin Odegaard and Riccardo Calafiori could all miss Arsenal's Premier League clash with Liverpool on Sunday. Riccardo Calafiori, Arsenal's newest defensive signing, was forced to leave the pitch early during Tuesday's Champions League showing after picking up a suspected knee injury.

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon fires Liverpool warning after major transfer decision
arts.sum: Anthony Gordon was linked with a £75million move to Liverpool in the summer but has now signed a new contract extension

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta urges Arsenal fans to create hostile atmosphere against Liverpool
arts.sum: The Gunners trail Liverpool by four points.

arts.ttl: Leipzig confirm contract extension for Lukeba
arts.sum: Castello Lukeba has officially extended his contract with RB Leipig by a further year.

arts.ttl: RB Leipzig vs Liverpool Champions League clash predicted as hat-trick hero emerges
arts.sum: Liverpool take on RB Leipzig at the Red Bull Arena on Wednesday, so we simulated the Champions League clash to predict what could happen

arts.ttl: "Going for the title" - Liverpool expert on whether Slot's Reds are title challengers after Chelsea win
arts.sum: Liverpool expert David Lynch believes that the Reds still have to prove that they are genuine title challengers to Manchester City despite beating Chelsea on Sunday.

arts.ttl: ‘I was told’: Journalist shares the ‘problem’ he’s heard about regarding Trent Alexander-Arnold at Liverpool
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold’s Liverpool future is up in the air at the moment. Alexander-Arnold has been strongly linked with a move to Real Madrid, and with...

arts.ttl: Liverpool discover perfect Mohamed Salah heir as Arne Slot sent 'wonderful' £33m transfer plea
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is set to leave Liverpool when his contract expires in the summer – unless, of course, he pens an extension in the meantime

arts.ttl: Cody Gakpo reveals Liverpool fashion secrets and how he's 'way more chill'
arts.sum: Liverpool star Cody Gakpo says he's "way more chill" than his teammates when it comes to arriving at the training ground in style - but admits he does have a strong interest in the fashion industry. The Anfield club have proven that they are some of the best dressed in the game, projecting their personal styles and embracing their unique designs.

arts.ttl: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta sends Liverpool 'right place' warning: 'We're more than comfortable'
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta is feeling confident ahead of his side's huge Premier League clash against Liverpool this weekend and has insisted they will be "flying"
